description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy slipper from carlton london makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing.UpperLeather straps across the midfoot with a toe separatorLeather strap at the backfoot with a buckle closureFabric and net flower on the midfootTPU footbed OutsoleDurable textured PU outsole with a mildly raised and textured heel for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
